panels.title: Team Rolling Avg Distance (km) Over Time
panels.description: 5-game rolling average of team distance, lower is better

targets.rawSql: SELECT g.played_at AS time, AVG(gu.distance_km) OVER (ORDER BY g.played_at ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg_dist_km FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id GROUP BY g.game_id, g.played_at ORDER BY g.played_at

panels.title: Player Rolling Avg Distance Over Time
panels.description: 5-game rolling average per player

targets.rawSql: SELECT g.played_at AS time, gu.player_name, AVG(gu.distance_km) OVER (PARTITION BY gu.player_name ORDER BY g.played_at ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_avg FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id ORDER BY g.played_at

panels.title: Guess Time vs Distance (clicked guesses only)
panels.description: Scatter plot: speed vs accuracy per player. Excludes timeouts (score=0, dist>10000km)

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.time_seconds, gu.distance_km, gu.player_name FROM geoguessr.guesses gu WHERE gu.time_seconds > 0 AND gu.score > 0 AND gu.distance_km <= 10000 ORDER BY gu.player_name

panels.title: Win Rate Over Time
panels.description: Team win rate calculated as a 10-game rolling window

targets.rawSql: SELECT played_at AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN game_won THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) OVER (ORDER BY played_at ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * 100 AS win_rate_pct FROM geoguessr.games WHERE game_won IS NOT NULL ORDER BY played_at

panels.title: Correct Country Rate Over Time
panels.description: 10-game rolling correct country % per player

targets.rawSql: WITH per_game AS (SELECT g.played_at, gu.player_name, AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS acc FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id WHERE gu.correct_country_flag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.game_id, g.played_at, gu.player_name) SELECT played_at AS time, player_name, AVG(acc) OVER (PARTITION BY player_name ORDER BY played_at ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * 100 AS country_acc_pct FROM per_game ORDER BY played_at

panels.title: Countries Worth Studying
panels.description: Countries with worst average distance, weighted by frequency. Min 3 guesses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS guess_count, ROUND((AVG(gu.distance_km) * LN(COUNT(*) + 1))::numeric, 1) AS importance FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' AND r.pano_country_name != 'Unknown' GROUP BY r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY importance DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Countries I Confuse
panels.description: Most common country confusion pairs (actual -> guessed)

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name AS actual_country, gu.guessed_country AS guessed, COUNT(*) AS times FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE gu.correct_country_flag = false AND r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' AND gu.guessed_country IS NOT NULL AND gu.guessed_country != '' AND gu.guessed_country != 'Unknown' AND gu.guessed_country != 'Lost at Sea' ORDER BY times DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Best Countries (Lowest Avg Distance)
panels.description: Countries with best accuracy per player, min 3 guesses

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS guesses, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS correct_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' GROUP BY gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY avg_dist_km ASC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Move vs No-Move: Avg Distance
panels.description: Performance comparison by movement mode per player

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, g.move_mode, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id WHERE g.move_mode IS NOT NULL AND g.move_mode != '' GROUP BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode ORDER BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode

panels.title: Speed Ranking (Avg Guess Time)
panels.description: Average time per guess by player, excludes timeouts. Shows % of clicked guesses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT player_name, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND distance_km <= 10000 THEN time_seconds END)::numeric, 1) AS avg_time_sec, COUNT(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND distance_km <= 10000 THEN 1 END) AS clicked_guesses, COUNT(*) AS total_guesses, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND distance_km <= 10000 THEN 1 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1) AS click_rate_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses WHERE time_seconds > 0 GROUP BY player_name ORDER BY avg_time_sec ASC

panels.title: Summary Stats
panels.description: Key metrics at a glance

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) AS total_games, COUNT(*) AS total_guesses, COUNT(DISTINCT player_name) AS players, ROUND(AVG(distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS country_acc_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses

panels.title: Won Team % (Beat Teammate)
panels.description: How often each player had a better guess than their teammate, by move mode

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, g.move_mode, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.won_team THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS won_team_pct, COUNT(*) AS rounds FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.games g ON gu.game_id = g.game_id WHERE gu.won_team IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode ORDER BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode

panels.title: Won Round % (Best Overall Guess)
panels.description: How often each player had the best guess across all players in the round, by move mode

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, g.move_mode, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.won_round THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS won_round_pct, COUNT(*) AS rounds FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.games g ON gu.game_id = g.game_id WHERE gu.won_round IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode ORDER BY gu.player_name, g.move_mode

panels.title: Worst Countries (Highest Avg Distance)
panels.description: Countries with worst accuracy per player, min 3 guesses

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS guesses, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS correct_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' GROUP BY gu.player_name, r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY avg_dist_km DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Region Performance (Avg Distance by Continent)
panels.description: Average distance per player per region. Lower is better.

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.region, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS guesses, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS correct_pct FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE r.region IS NOT NULL AND r.region != '' AND r.region != 'Unknown' AND r.region != 'Other' GROUP BY gu.player_name, r.region ORDER BY gu.player_name, avg_dist_km

panels.title: Player Win/Loss Distance Split
panels.description: Average distance in wins vs losses per player

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, CASE WHEN g.game_won THEN 'Win' ELSE 'Loss' END AS outcome, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.games g ON gu.game_id = g.game_id WHERE g.game_won IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gu.player_name, g.game_won ORDER BY gu.player_name, outcome

panels.title: Competitive Advantage by Country
panels.description: Countries where your team outperforms opponents (positive advantage = you're better). Min 3 guesses each side.

targets.rawSql: WITH team_players AS (SELECT DISTINCT player_id FROM geoguessr.guesses WHERE is_team_best_guess IS NOT NULL), my_team AS (SELECT r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS my_avg_dist, COUNT(*) AS my_guesses FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE gu.player_id IN (SELECT player_id FROM team_players) AND r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' GROUP BY r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3), opponents AS (SELECT r.pano_country_name AS country, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS opp_avg_dist, COUNT(*) AS opp_guesses FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE gu.player_id NOT IN (SELECT player_id FROM team_players) AND r.pano_country_name IS NOT NULL AND r.pano_country_name != '' GROUP BY r.pano_country_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3) SELECT m.country, m.my_avg_dist, o.opp_avg_dist, ROUND((o.opp_avg_dist - m.my_avg_dist)::numeric, 1) AS advantage_km FROM my_team m JOIN opponents o ON m.country = o.country ORDER BY advantage_km DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent vs All-Time (Last 10 Games)
panels.description: Per-player comparison of last 10 games vs all-time averages. Shows distance, country accuracy, win rate, and time.

targets.rawSql: WITH recent_games AS (SELECT game_id FROM geoguessr.games ORDER BY played_at DESC LIMIT 10), alltime AS (SELECT gu.player_name, 'All-Time' AS period, COUNT(DISTINCT gu.game_id) AS games, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS country_acc_pct, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN g.game_won THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS win_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(gu.time_seconds)::numeric, 1) AS avg_time_sec FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.games g ON gu.game_id = g.game_id GROUP BY gu.player_name), recent AS (SELECT gu.player_name, 'Last 10' AS period, COUNT(DISTINCT gu.game_id) AS games, ROUND(AVG(gu.distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN gu.correct_country_flag THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS country_acc_pct, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN g.game_won THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric * 100, 1) AS win_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(gu.time_seconds)::numeric, 1) AS avg_time_sec FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.games g ON gu.game_id = g.game_id WHERE gu.game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM recent_games) GROUP BY gu.player_name) SELECT * FROM alltime UNION ALL SELECT * FROM recent ORDER BY player_name, period

panels.title: Initiative Rate by Player
panels.description: How often each player clicks first (initiative rate %) and participation rate %

targets.rawSql: WITH player_stats AS (SELECT player_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE clicked_first = true AND status = 'guessed') AS clicked_first_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'guessed') AS guessed_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM geoguessr.guesses WHERE status IS NOT NULL AND status != '' GROUP BY player_name) SELECT player_name, ROUND(clicked_first_count::numeric / NULLIF(guessed_count, 0) * 100, 1) AS initiative_rate_pct, ROUND(guessed_count::numeric / NULLIF(total_count, 0) * 100, 1) AS participation_rate_pct FROM player_stats ORDER BY initiative_rate_pct DESC

panels.title: Initiative Rate Over Time
panels.description: 5-game rolling initiative rate (% of rounds where player clicked first)

targets.rawSql: WITH per_game AS (SELECT g.played_at, gu.player_name, AVG(CASE WHEN gu.clicked_first AND gu.status = 'guessed' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS init_rate FROM geoguessr.games g JOIN geoguessr.guesses gu ON g.game_id = gu.game_id WHERE gu.status IS NOT NULL AND gu.status != '' GROUP BY g.game_id, g.played_at, gu.player_name) SELECT played_at AS time, player_name, AVG(init_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY player_name ORDER BY played_at ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) * 100 AS initiative_rate_pct FROM per_game ORDER BY played_at

panels.title: Guess Speed by Region
panels.description: Average time remaining (sec) when guess submitted, per player per region. Higher = clicked faster.

targets.rawSql: SELECT gu.player_name, r.region, ROUND(AVG(gu.time_remaining_sec)::numeric, 1) AS avg_time_remaining_sec, COUNT(*) AS guesses FROM geoguessr.guesses gu JOIN geoguessr.rounds r ON gu.game_id = r.game_id AND gu.round_number = r.round_number WHERE gu.status = 'guessed' AND gu.time_remaining_sec IS NOT NULL AND r.region IS NOT NULL AND r.region != '' AND r.region != 'Unknown' AND r.region != 'Other' GROUP BY gu.player_name, r.region ORDER BY gu.player_name, avg_time_remaining_sec DESC

panels.title: No-Pin Analysis
panels.description: Rounds where player did not drop a pin: count, percentage, and round loss rate

targets.rawSql: WITH player_nopin AS (SELECT player_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'no_pin') AS no_pin_count, COUNT(*) AS total_rounds, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'no_pin' AND won_round = false) AS no_pin_losses FROM geoguessr.guesses WHERE status IS NOT NULL AND status != '' GROUP BY player_name) SELECT player_name, no_pin_count, total_rounds, ROUND(no_pin_count::numeric / NULLIF(total_rounds, 0) * 100, 1) AS no_pin_pct, ROUND(no_pin_losses::numeric / NULLIF(no_pin_count, 0) * 100, 1) AS loss_when_no_pin_pct FROM player_nopin ORDER BY no_pin_pct DESC

panels.title: Hesitation Index (Team Coordination)
panels.description: Average gap (sec) between first and last guess per round. Lower = more coordinated.

targets.rawSql: WITH round_hesitation AS (SELECT gu.game_id, gu.round_number, MAX(gu.time_remaining_sec) - MIN(gu.time_remaining_sec) AS hesitation_sec FROM geoguessr.guesses gu WHERE gu.status = 'guessed' AND gu.time_remaining_sec IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gu.game_id, gu.round_number HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) SELECT g.played_at AS time, AVG(rh.hesitation_sec) OVER (ORDER BY g.played_at ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_hesitation_sec FROM round_hesitation rh JOIN geoguessr.games g ON rh.game_id = g.game_id ORDER BY g.played_at

panels.title: Pressure Response
panels.description: Average distance after winning vs losing the previous round. Shows clutch performance under pressure.

targets.rawSql: WITH ordered_rounds AS (SELECT gu.player_name, gu.game_id, gu.round_number, gu.distance_km, gu.won_round, LAG(gu.won_round) OVER (PARTITION BY gu.player_name, gu.game_id ORDER BY gu.round_number) AS prev_won_round FROM geoguessr.guesses gu WHERE gu.status = 'guessed') SELECT player_name, CASE WHEN prev_won_round THEN 'After Win' ELSE 'After Loss' END AS prev_outcome, ROUND(AVG(distance_km)::numeric, 1) AS avg_dist_km, COUNT(*) AS rounds FROM ordered_rounds WHERE prev_won_round IS NOT NULL GROUP BY player_name, prev_won_round ORDER BY player_name, prev_outcome
